name: The Back Nine Golf | Littleton, CO
about: The Back Nine Golf in Littleton, Colorado, is a dedicated golf simulator venue. It is designed to provide an immersive golfing experience through advanced technology. The venue offers a space for golfers to practice and play in a controlled environment. It caters to individuals looking for a high-tech golfing experience outside of a traditional course setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf access regardless of weather
Advanced simulation technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor location for practice and play
Privacy and focus in a dedicated golf environment

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service provided.
No information on alcohol service provided. BYOB status is unknown.
